name: Creamy Hawaiian Salads
recipeIngredient: Sour cream (regular, light or no-fat), 1 cup
Pineapple chunks in juice, 1 can (20 oz), drained
Papaya, medium, peeled and pitted, cubed
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, gently toss together all ingredients except the chopped walnuts.
2. Sprinkle with chopped walnuts, if desired.
3. Serve immediately.
4. Yield: 6 servings.
Nutrition Information (1 serving): Calories 220; Protein 4g; Carbohydrate 24g; Fat 14g; Cholesterol 20mg; Sodium 45mg.
